summary: Fixed two bugs causing --model routing to fail in Discord. (1) The llama-swap-proxy was missing a GET /models → GET /v1/models rewrite; OMP's llama.cpp provider discovery was 404ing on startup, marking the provider unavailable and silently falling back to Claude for every --model request. Fixed by adding the /models rewrite to the proxy rewrite table. (2) Discord autocorrects -- to — (U+2014 em dash); the --model prefix check was a plain ASCII string comparison that never matched. Fixed by replacing em dashes with -- immediately after reading msg.content, before any command parsing.
details:
Files changed:
- ~/.local/bin/llama-swap-proxy.py: added /models → /v1/models to PATH_REWRITES dict
- ~/.config/systemd/user/llama-swap-proxy.service: Requires= → Wants= to eliminate boot ordering cycle that killed the proxy on every reboot
- src/services/discord_service.rs: msg.content.replace('\u{2014}', "--") before command parsing
- README.md: added /models row to proxy rewrite table with explanation of why it matters

Security: no new attack surface. The em-dash replacement only normalizes the message string before existing parsing logic. The proxy rewrite adds one additional path but only locally (127.0.0.1). No new dependencies.
